item.title:
gm
Let no foul word ever pass your lips. Say only what is useful for education, so that your words ...
item.description:
gm
Let no foul word ever pass your lips. Say only what is useful for education, so that your words may benefit your listeners.
--- @tunguz | ❤️ 6 | 🔁 1 | 💬 1 | 👁 268
